heading: Naming Conventions: Do's and Don'ts
rows: Names should reveal intent without reading surrounding code
Prefix with is, has, can, should -- reads like English
Use verb + noun describing exactly what it does
Prefix with handle or on to signal it is an event callback
PascalCase, descriptive of what it renders
One purpose per file, named after its export
SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE, descriptive of what the value represents
BEM or descriptive names tied to purpose, not appearance
